typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: VAL-CROSS-001/002 rendered evidence remains missing: tests still rely on `inspect()` non-nil and store-state reads instead of asserting rendered Dashboard/Popover active indicators and labels.
Cross-surface switch synchronization still uses direct `setActiveProfile(...)` store mutation rather than user-action switch paths in Dashboard/Popover.
VAL-CROSS-009 launch-chain assertions still do not invoke browser/CLI adapters/services and therefore do not prove action-chain routing behavior.
Rapid-switch browser A→B→C test only verifies browser type/error-class outcomes, so stale routing to A/B can still pass; final committed profile-ID routing is not proven.
Rapid-switch CLI A→B→C test similarly validates executable type, not routed profile ID, leaving final active-profile routing evidence incomplete.
Runtime log tests still populate test-local collectors with helper strings rather than intercepting emitted startup/sync log sink output from production callsites.
Cross-flow VAL-CROSS-006 checks remain helper-driven and do not verify deterministic emitted-log capture for startup/sync paths.
Fix scope mismatch: commit hardens CLI executable-availability assertions but does not remediate original failed feature's cross-surface contract gaps.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a known-constraint note that CLI rapid-switch active-routing tests are availability-dependent on local executable presence and should use deterministic availability-aware assertions in contract tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature integration-hardening-fix-cli-active-routing-test-availability-awareness had to harden environment-dependent CLI routing assertions, while AGENTS currently documents only analogous browser environment sensitivity.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated followedProcedure/context-read-evidence and incomplete validation-stack observations in switcher worker handoffs.
Repeated recommendation to require rendered UI/action-chain evidence for VAL-CROSS in switcher UI work.
Potential library/services updates from review findings.
